exercises.code:
# Fixture del paquete (conserva datos; no reescribas asserts)
import numpy as np

def resumen(x):
    x = np.asarray(x, dtype=float)
    return {
        "n": int(x.size),
        "mean": round(float(x.mean()), 4),
        "median": round(float(np.median(x)), 4),
        "std": round(float(x.std(ddof=1)), 4),
    }
print(resumen([1, 2, 3, 4, 5]))

exercises.code:
import numpy as np
z = np.arange(5, dtype=float)
x = z.copy()
y = z.copy()
r_raw = float(np.corrcoef(x, y)[0, 1])
bx = np.polyfit(z, x, 1)
by = np.polyfit(z, y, 1)
rx = x - (bx[0] * z + bx[1])
ry = y - (by[0] * z + by[1])
print("r_raw", round(r_raw, 1), "| max_abs_resid", round(float(max(abs(rx).max(), abs(ry).max())), 1))
# D2-Explorer: packet-only re-walk S18 S18-T3-A-E3

Hints del packet: Residualiza x e y respecto a z.; corrcoef de residuales ≈ 0 o nan controlado.. Salida observada: r_raw 0.9999999999999999 | max_abs_resid 4.440892098500626e-16.
